metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for vibe-resume — turns AI coding history into a versioned résumé.

plugins.name: vibe-resume
plugins.description: Turn your AI coding history (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Copilot, Cline, Continue, Aider, Windsurf, Zed AI + cloud chat exports + AIGC tools) into a versioned, reviewer-scored résumé across 10 locales. Bundles the ai-used-resume skill.
